name: useKeyPressEvent
description: Hook that listens for key press events on specified targets

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key or array of keys to listen for.

parameters.description: The target to attach the event listener to.

parameters.description: The callback function to be executed when the specified key or keys are pressed.
